_instructions.purpose: This is the schema for a custom grant format in VMARO. Fill in all fields and upload via the Streamlit UI.
_instructions.format_id_rules: Lowercase, underscores only, no spaces. Must be unique. Example: my_university_internal
_instructions.domain_keywords_tip: These are used by the LLM matcher to auto-select this format. Include topic words your grant covers.
_instructions.section_notes_tip: Use the 'notes' field in each section to give Agent 5 specific guidance for that section.

name: Full Human-Readable Name of the Grant
emphasis: Describe what reviewers care most about. This is injected directly into Agent 5's system prompt. Be specific — mention if certain sections are weighted, if preliminary data is expected, if societal impact is a first-class criterion, etc.
avoid: Describe what NOT to do in this format. E.g. avoid clinical framing, avoid incremental objectives, avoid overselling commercialization.
rhetorical_tone: Academic and precise | Clinical and mechanistic | Bold and exploratory | Policy-aware and impact-forward | Direct and capability-focused

sections.name: Section Name
sections.notes: Specific guidance for this section. What must it contain? Any structural requirements?

sections.name: Second Section Name
sections.notes: Use max_words OR max_pages, not both. Set the unused one to null.

sections.name: Optional Section
sections.notes: Set required to false for optional sections.

notes: Any additional context about this grant format that doesn't fit above.
